basic_details.job_title: RBI Banks Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.post_name: Bank’s Medical Consultant (BMC) – Part-Time on Contract
basic_details.job_location: RBI Main Office Premises, Aizawl, Mizoram
basic_details.short_information: RBI Aizawl is recruiting a qualified medical professional on part-time contract basis to provide healthcare services to staff and their families at the Bank’s dispensary.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be communicated to shortlisted candidates

age_limit.details: Age limit is not explicitly mentioned. However, candidates should be medically fit and capable of performing the required duties.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: MBBS degree from a recognized university (Allopathic system). Post Graduate degree in General Medicine is preferred. Experience: Minimum 2 years of experience practicing medicine in a hospital or clinic. Residence: Dispensary or residence should be within 10-15 km radius from the Bank’s dispensary. EWS Certificate: Valid Income & Asset Certificate as per GoI guidelines for 2026-27.

vacancy_details.Duty Hours: 02 Hours per day (Monday to Friday) during Bank’s working hours
vacancy_details.Remuneration: ₹1,000/- per hour (all inclusive) + ₹1,000/- pm conveyance + ₹1,000/- pm mobile charges (pro-rata)

category_wise_breakdown.duty_hours: 02 Hours per day (Monday to Friday) during Bank’s working hours
category_wise_breakdown.remuneration: ₹1,000/- per hour (all inclusive) + ₹1,000/- pm conveyance + ₹1,000/- pm mobile charges (pro-rata)

category_wise_vacancy.Duty Hours: 02 Hours per day (Monday to Friday) during Bank’s working hours

salary_details.details: ₹1,000/- per hour for the entire contract period of 3 years. ₹1,000/- per month towards conveyance expenses. ₹1,000/- per month towards mobile charges (pro-rata basis). Remuneration is fixed and all-inclusive.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility. Interview of shortlisted candidates. Medical fitness test (cost borne by candidate). Final selection subject to verification of documents and acceptance of terms & conditions.
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application format (Annex-III) from the notification.
Send it in a sealed cover superscribed “Application for the Post of Bank’s Medical Consultant (BMC) on Contract Basis with Fixed Hourly Remuneration”.

Submit to: The General Manager & Officer-in-Charge, Reserve Bank of India, Human Resource Management Department, House No. T-30, VZ Building, Thakthing Veng, Aizawl - 796005 on or before 24-07-2026 (05:00 PM).
important_instructions: Only EWS category candidates can apply for this post. No renewal of contract after 3 years. The Bank reserves the right to review remuneration, duty hours, and location. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Selected candidate must enter into an agreement with the Bank.

content_sections.heading: Reserve Bank of India Aizawl Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Reserve Bank of India, Human Resources Management Department, Aizawl has issued notification for engagement of Part-Time Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) on contract basis with fixed hourly remuneration. The notification includes eligibility criteria, terms & conditions, remuneration structure, selection procedure, and application instructions. Candidates belonging to EWS category are encouraged to apply. Download RBI Aizawl Bank's Medical Consultant Recruitment Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Reserve Bank of India Aizawl Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: RBI Aizawl is recruiting a qualified medical professional on part-time contract basis to provide healthcare services to staff and their families at the Bank’s dispensary.

content_sections.heading: RBI Bank's Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

rows.duty_hours: 02 Hours per day (Monday to Friday) during Bank’s working hours
rows.remuneration: ₹1,000/- per hour (all inclusive) + ₹1,000/- pm conveyance + ₹1,000/- pm mobile charges (pro-rata)

content_sections.heading: RBI Aizawl Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: MBBS degree from a recognized university (Allopathic system). Post Graduate degree in General Medicine is preferred. Experience: Minimum 2 years of experience practicing medicine in a hospital or clinic. Residence: Dispensary or residence should be within 10-15 km radius from the Bank’s dispensary. EWS Certificate: Valid Income & Asset Certificate as per GoI guidelines for 2026-27.

content_sections.heading: RBI Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limit is not explicitly mentioned. However, candidates should be medically fit and capable of performing the required duties.

content_sections.heading: RBI Aizawl Bank's Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Remuneration
content_sections.text: ₹1,000/- per hour for the entire contract period of 3 years. ₹1,000/- per month towards conveyance expenses. ₹1,000/- per month towards mobile charges (pro-rata basis). Remuneration is fixed and all-inclusive.

content_sections.heading: RBI Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on eligibility. Interview of shortlisted candidates. Medical fitness test (cost borne by candidate). Final selection subject to verification of documents and acceptance of terms & conditions.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RBI Aizawl BMC Post
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application format (Annex-III) from the notification. Fill the application completely. Send it in a sealed cover superscribed “Application for the Post of Bank’s Medical Consultant (BMC) on Contract Basis with Fixed Hourly Remuneration”. Submit to: The General Manager & Officer-in-Charge, Reserve Bank of India, Human Resource Management Department, House No. T-30, VZ Building, Thakthing Veng, Aizawl - 796005 on or before 24-07-2026 (05:00 PM).

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for RBI Candidates
content_sections.text: Only EWS category candidates can apply for this post. No renewal of contract after 3 years. The Bank reserves the right to review remuneration, duty hours, and location. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Selected candidate must enter into an agreement with the Bank.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RBI Aizawl BMC Recruitment 2026?
Q2. How many posts are announced in RBI Aizawl Medical Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: 01 post reserved for Economically Weaker Sections (EWS).

faq.question: Q3. What is the remuneration for Bank's Medical Consultant at RBI Aizawl?
faq.answer: ₹1,000/- per hour + conveyance and mobile allowances.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification for RBI BMC post?
faq.answer: MBBS degree with minimum 2 years of clinical experience. PG in General Medicine is preferred.

faq.question: Q5. Is the RBI Aizawl Medical Consultant position full-time or part-time?
faq.answer: Part-time on contract basis (02 hours per day).

faq.question: Q6. What is the contract duration for RBI Bank's Medical Consultant?
faq.answer: 3 years (no renewal).

faq.question: Q7. Where should I send the application for RBI Aizawl BMC post?
faq.answer: To the General Manager & Officer-in-Charge, RBI Aizawl Office (address given in notification).

faq.question: Q8. Is EWS certificate mandatory for this RBI recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, valid Income & Asset Certificate for 2026-27 is required.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be an interview for RBI Aizawl Medical Consultant selection?
faq.answer: Yes, selection will be through interview of eligible shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duty location for RBI Aizawl Bank's Medical Consultant?
faq.answer: RBI Main Office Premises, Thakthing Veng, Aizawl.
